resources.string: You will create a report for
DANGER: Generate workdays for selected month and test purpose?
This will create missing weekday workday rows for the selected month. Existing rows are kept unchanged.
DANGER: Generate workdays for selected year and test purpose?
This will create missing weekday workday rows for the selected year. Existing rows are kept unchanged.
The monthly XLSX report of the selected day and its\' month is saved in \"Downloads/\'app_name\'\" folder.
Generated %1$d of %2$d weekday workdays for %3$s to %4$s.
Refreshed %1$d workdays (%2$d updated, %3$d created) for %4$s to %5$s.
Default work type cannot be deleted.
